channel.title: Tenside Surfactants Detergents
channel.description: A RSS feed containing the latest articles published in Tenside Surfactants Detergents

item.title: How to better realise the potential of automatic dishwashing to reduce the energy (and water) use in European households: introduction of a ‘short eco’ programme
item.description: Article by Ali Khalfallah DOI: https://doi.org/10.1515/tsd-2024-2634

item.title: Ionic surfactants critical micelle concentration modelling in water/organic solvent mixtures using random forest and support vector machine algorithms
item.description: Article by Ali Khalfallah DOI: https://doi.org/10.1515/tsd-2024-2636

item.title: Research on a synergistic formula of anionic and betaine type surfactants for natural gas fields
item.description: Article by Ali Khalfallah DOI: https://doi.org/10.1515/tsd-2024-2608

item.title: Effect of amphiphilic nanoparticles and non-ionic surfactants on emulsion stability
item.description: Article by Ali Khalfallah DOI: https://doi.org/10.1515/tsd-2024-2617

item.title: Rheology on novel UV–light irradiation thinning and thickening viscoelastic oleamidopropyl dimethylamine/trans-o-methoxycinnamic acid micelle systems
item.description: Article by Ali Khalfallah DOI: https://doi.org/10.1515/tsd-2024-2630

item.title: Forced stability studies and estimation of encapsulated ellagic acid in nano-formulations using UV-spectroscopy
item.description: Article by Ali Khalfallah DOI: https://doi.org/10.1515/tsd-2024-2614

item.title: Cloud point extraction of heavy metal ions for wastewater remediation: an equilibrium and kinetic study
item.description: Article by Ali Khalfallah DOI: https://doi.org/10.1515/tsd-2024-2628

item.title: Development and blocking assessment of high softening point asphalt system
item.description: Article by Ali Khalfallah DOI: https://doi.org/10.1515/tsd-2024-2613

item.title: Effect of hydrophile–lipophile balance of F-alkylated cyclic polyethylene glycol succinates on their applications
item.description: Article by Ali Khalfallah DOI: https://doi.org/10.1515/tsd-2024-2625
